column4: I liked meeting with the different instructors and learning about their experiences. I enjoyed learning about new technologies and frameworks and career paths that I can take one day. I liked that we were taught by industry professionals so they knew a lot about the field and gave us very good advice
column5: I did not enjoy at times how fast paced we moved. A lot of things remained unclear and further research needed to be done to clear up some things.
column6: I wish we had more time to understand the projects that we were going to work on but I like the hands on training approach
